name: The Mythical City 3
detailed_description:
Two sides, two crystals. The side that destroys the enemy crystal wins. Defend yourself with everything that is available to you. Hire mercenaries by placing them on your territory. Install saws to destroy the enemy. Be careful, the enemy also has something to answer with. They can win with crowd or quality. Some create their own copies after death, some attack near, some from afar. Use the resources correctly and you will win!

Features:
  • Dynamic gameplay
  • Crowds of different enemies
  • A tactical game
  • Different ways to defend against enemies
  • 10 levels of the game
  • Saving current wins
  • Interesting gameplay
